itemdesc-fieldcamera: A heavy wooden box used to capture moments in time on glass plates.
itemdesc-fieldcamera-loaded-silvered: A field camera loaded with a sensitized plate.
itemdesc-fieldcamera-loaded-exposed: A field camera loaded with an exposed plate.
photocore:camera-info-controls: <icon>rightmousebutton</icon> to look through the viewfinder, <icon>leftmousebutton</icon> to start/pause exposure.
photocore:camera-info-load-attach-hint: <hk>shift</hk> + <icon>rightmousebutton</icon> with a Sensitized Plate or tripod in offhand to load or mount it.
photocore:camera-info-unload-detach-hint: <hk>shift</hk> + <icon>rightmousebutton</icon> with empty offhand to unload the plate, or remove the tripod once unloaded.
itemdesc-tripod: A folding wooden tripod that holds a field camera steady for long exposures.
blockdesc-platebox: Stores and protects prepared plates. Use <icon>rightmousebutton</icon> on slots with a plate to store. <icon>rightmousebutton</icon> on a stored plate to retrieve it.
itemdesc-drycollodionmix: A dry mix that can be sealed with water in a barrel to make collodion.
itemdesc-collodionportion: A syrupy chemical used to coat plates.
itemdesc-silversolutionportion: A sensitizing solution for collodion-coated plates.
itemdesc-developerportion: Begins to reveal the latent image on an exposed plate.
itemdesc-fixerportion: Stabilizes a developed plate so it can be handled in light.
blockdesc-framedphotographwall-*: A wall-mounted oak frame for displaying photographs. Hold a finished photo plate and <icon>rightmousebutton</icon> to insert.
blockdesc-framedphotographground-*: A free-standing easel frame for displaying photographs. Hold a finished photo plate and <icon>rightmousebutton</icon> to insert.
blockdesc-developmenttray-blue: A shallow tray for developing and fixing wet plates.
blockdesc-developmenttray-red: A shallow tray for developing and fixing wet plates.
blockdesc-developmenttray-fire: A shallow tray for developing and fixing wet plates.
itemdesc-developmenttray-raw-blue: A clay tray that must be fired before use.
itemdesc-developmenttray-raw-red: A clay tray that must be fired before use.
itemdesc-developmenttray-raw-fire: A clay tray that must be fired before use.
photocore:heldhelp-developmenttray-recla: Reclaim plate to rough glass (destroys the image)
photocore:msg-tip-f4-guiless: photocore: Tip - press <hk>togglehud</hk> to toggle gui-less mode (hide HUD) while using the viewfinder.
photocore:msg-plate-not-exposable: photocore: only fresh or paused exposure plates can be exposed.
photocore:msg-plate-fully-exposed: photocore: this plate has been fully exposed and cannot be exposed further.
photocore:msg-plate-max-frames: photocore: this plate cannot be exposed any further (maximum {0} frames reached).
photocore:msg-exposure-target-reached: photocore: this exposure has reached its target and can't be resumed.
photocore:msg-exposure-already-active: photocore: another exposure is already in progress.
photocore:msg-exposure-save-failed: photocore: could not save exposure data to disk — partial exposures may not persist across sessions.
photocore:msg-load-sensitized-plate: photocore: load a sensitized plate to take a photo.
photocore:msg-plate-other-photographer: photocore: this plate belongs to another photographer.
photocore:msg-tray-other-photographer: photocore: only the original photographer can develop this plate.
photocore:msg-develop-not-whitelisted: photocore: you aren't on this server's develop whitelist — you can expose plates, but only whitelisted players can develop them. Your exposure has been kept.
photocore:msg-mounted-load-hint: photocore: hold a sensitized plate and right-click to load.
photocore:msg-mounted-pause-first: photocore: pause the exposure first (<icon>rightmousebutton</icon>) before unloading.
photocore:msg-mounted-other-active: photocore: someone else's exposure is in progress.
photocore:msg-mounted-other-paused: photocore: someone else's paused exposure — <hk>shift</hk>+<icon>rightmousebutton</icon> to unload the plate, or <hk>shift</hk>+<hk>ctrl</hk>+<icon>rightmousebutton</icon> to recover the camera.
photocore:msg-plate-dried-no-expose: photocore: this plate has dried out and can no longer be exposed.
photocore:msg-plate-dried-reclaim: photocore: this plate has dried out — wash it in a development tray to reclaim the glass.
photocore:msg-tray-plate-dried: photocore: the plate has dried and can no longer be used.
photocore:msg-plate-not-enough-cloth: photocore: you need {0} of the same cloth to polish this plate.
photocore:configlib-showdebuglogs-commen: Turns on verbose debug/dev logging. Leave it off unless troubleshooting or reporting a bug.
photocore:configlib-maxaccumulatedframes: Caps how many frames a single exposure can accumulate. Push it higher for longer exposures, at the cost of more memory. Yours alone to set -- in multiplayer it only affects exposures you personally take.
photocore:configlib-section-serverauth: Server-Authoritative Settings (only take effect in singleplayer or while hosting)
photocore:configlib-photoseenpinginterva: How often, in seconds, a client pings the server to confirm they're still viewing a photo (keeps /photoadmin's last-seen tracking accurate). 0 disables just the ping -- uploads/downloads still count as seen.
photocore:configlib-photodeletegracehour: How many real-world hours a photo is protected from /photoadmin's age/count-based auto-deletion after it's first seen (or, for never-seen photos, after its file was created). 0 removes the grace period entirely.
photocore:configlib-pausedryingduringexp: When a plate is exposing (or paused mid-exposure), its drying clock stops ticking. The host's value decides whether drying actually pauses.
photocore:configlib-applyfinishingeffect: When on, film-look effects (grain, vignette, halation, dust, and the rest) get baked developed photos. The host's value decides whether effects are applied.
photocore:configlib-photocapturemaxdimen: The longest side, in pixels, of a captured photo. Higher means sharper photos, but bigger files and more sync traffic for everyone downloading them. The host's value decides the actual maximum dimension.
photocore:configlib-chemicalunitsperuse-: How many developer/fixer/water units one tray pour uses up. Lower means cheaper processing. The host's value decides what actually gets consumed.
photocore:configlib-polishseconds-commen: How long players need to hold to polish a rough plate, in seconds. 0 makes it instant. The host's value decides when polishing actually finishes.
photocore:configlib-sensitizationpoursec: How long one sensitization pour takes to hold, in seconds. 0 makes it instant. The host's value decides when the pour actually finishes.
photocore:configlib-clothconsumedperpoli: How much cloth gets used up per polish. Set to 0 to turn cloth consumption off entirely. The host's value decides what actually gets consumed.
photocore:configlib-wetdurationhours-com: How long a freshly-sensitized plate stays wet, in in-game hours (runs faster or slower with the world's time speed). The host's value decides the real drying window.
photocore:configlib-plateboxdryingmultip: How fast plates dry inside a plate box. 0 pauses drying entirely (the default), 1 dries at the same rate as open air. The host's value decides the real rate.
photocore:configlib-allowreclaimingother: Whether players can wash away an exposed plate that someone else exposed. Only covers plates exposed but not yet developed -- once a plate has been developed, anyone can reclaim it either way. The host's value decides.
photocore:configlib-developerpourduratio: How long a developer pour takes, in seconds. The host's value decides when it actually finishes.
photocore:configlib-fixerpourduration-co: How long a fixer pour takes, in seconds. The host's value decides when it actually finishes.
photocore:configlib-waterpourduration-co: How long a water (reclaim) pour takes, in seconds. The host's value decides when it actually finishes.
